connections.gloss: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.
have compassion (on, upon), love, (find, have, obtain, shew) mercy(-iful, on, upon), (have) pity, Ruhamah, [idiom] surely.
have compassion (pity on), have (obtain, receive, shew) mercy (on)
connections.def: from 1656; to compassionate (by word or deed, specially, by divine grace):--have compassion (pity on), have (obtain, receive, shew) mercy (on). see GREEK for
of uncertain affinity; compassion (human or divine, especially active):--(+ tender)

connections.gloss: beseech, [idiom] fair, (be, find, shew) favour(-able), be (deal, give, grant (gracious(-ly), intreat, (be) merciful, have (shew) mercy (on, upon), have pity upon, pray, make supplication, [idiom] very.
bowels, compassion, damsel, tender love, (great, tender) mercy, pity, womb.
